name: freelancers using QuickBooks processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For freelancers using QuickBooks processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient timesheet data entry causes delayed payments. We automate data extraction and summarization instead of manual timesheet entry and calculation in QuickBooks.
problem_solved: Delayed payments due to inefficient timesheet data processing.
